biography: Tomas, a familiar name at the Hector Trophée, has been a member of Espoo Ringside Golf for many years. A man of quiet determination, Tomas approaches each round with a focused intensity that is admired by his peers.

With 3 past appearances at the Hector Trophée, Tomas has shown commitment to this tournament. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his consistent performance speaks volumes about his dedication to the sport.
While Tomas is not expected to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts will remember his past contributions to the tournament.
